nasb.text: When you enter, you will come to a secure people with a spacious land; for God has given it into your hand, a place where there is no lack of anything that is on the earth.”

esv.text: As soon as you go, you will come to an unsuspecting people. The land is spacious, for God has given it into your hands, a place where there is no lack of anything that is in the earth.”

cnv.text: 你們到了那裡的時候，你們必遇見安然居住的人民；那地的兩邊寬闊，　神已經把那地交在你們手裡；那地百物俱全，一無所缺。”

ccb.text: 你们到了那里，会看见当地的居民毫无防范，那里地大物博，一无所缺。上帝已经把那地方赐给我们了。”
